name: Drupal Canvas
description: Empowers content creators to build experiences by composing components, with as much freedom as site builders allow, all without needing to write code.

submodules.name: canvas_ai
submodules.purpose: AI features for Drupal Canvas (integrates drupal/ai and ai_agents to assist building/editing components and layouts).

submodules.name: canvas_oauth
submodules.purpose: Provides OAuth2-based authentication for Canvas's external HTTP API (built on simple_oauth).

submodules.name: canvas_personalization
submodules.purpose: Adds personalization/segmentation features so component trees can vary by audience.

submodules.name: canvas_vite
submodules.purpose: Enables Hot Module Replacement (HMR) for Canvas via a Vite dev server for code-component development.
